entity.summary: Switzerland-based non-custodial cryptocurrency brokerage and execution service founded in 2014, operating from Neuchâtel under the Bity brand and Swiss anti-money-laundering supervision.
entity.notes: Official Bity material identifies a 2014 founding in Switzerland. The Bity Group SA commercial-register entry dates to January 7, 2014. Current official disclosures describe Bity as a non-custodial brokerage affiliated with SO-FIT under Swiss AML rules rather than a public order-book exchange.

expected.summary: Switzerland-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Bity brand.

changes.summary: Switzerland-based non-custodial cryptocurrency brokerage and execution service founded in 2014, operating from Neuchâtel under the Bity brand and Swiss anti-money-laundering supervision.
changes.notes: Official Bity material identifies a 2014 founding in Switzerland. The Bity Group SA commercial-register entry dates to January 7, 2014. Current official disclosures describe Bity as a non-custodial brokerage affiliated with SO-FIT under Swiss AML rules rather than a public order-book exchange.

events.title: The Bity corporate lineage was registered in Switzerland
events.description: The Bity Group SA was entered in the Swiss commercial register on January 7, 2014, providing the earliest verified corporate-lineage marker for the Bity service.
events.notes: This corporate-register date is used as the earliest verified lineage marker; the reviewed sources do not establish a separate exact public service-launch day.

evidence.title: Bity official website
evidence.notes: Official site states that Bity was established in Switzerland in 2014 and continues as a Swiss crypto brokerage.

evidence.title: The Bity Group SA commercial-register profile
evidence.notes: Swiss commercial-register profile records January 7, 2014 as the entry date for The Bity Group SA in Neuchâtel.

evidence.title: Is Bity regulated?
evidence.notes: Official disclosure describes Bity as a Swiss financial intermediary affiliated with SO-FIT and operating on a non-custodial basis.

evidence.title: FINMA authorises SO-FIT as a supervisory organisation
evidence.notes: FINMA announcement confirms SO-FIT's authorisation and recognition as a Swiss supervisory and self-regulatory organisation; Bity's affiliation is stated in its official disclosure.

evidence.title: FINMA warning distinguishes Bity SA from an unrelated warning-list entity
evidence.notes: FINMA explicitly states that the unrelated Bity Investment warning-list entity must not be confused with Bity SA of Neuchâtel, which is entered in the Swiss commercial register.
